subcodes.first_line: My honorable and dear friend: Your kind letter was received and its contents became the means of happiness
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست عزیز محترما نامه شما رسید و مضمون سبب سرور وجدان گردید زیرا دلالت میکرد
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @oneness; unity of religion, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social)
